archimate:Representation.name: Open Data
archimate:Representation.documentation:
Definition: Open Data ABB is a Representation of the information collected, produced or paid for by the public bodies and made freely available for re-use for any purpose
Source: European Comission
Source reference: https://data.europa.eu/en/trening/what-open-data
Example: The following implementation is an example of how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): datos.gob.es https://datos.gob.es/en
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
LOST view: Semantic view
Interoperability Saliency: The Open Data Representation ABB is salient for semantic interoperability because it is the basis for sharing, reusing and making available relevant and public information from public organisations and the digital public services delivery.
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/OpenDataRepresentation
ABB name: eira:OpenDataRepresentation
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/OpenDataRepresentation
Interoperability Layer: Semantic

properties.value: Open Data ABB is a Representation of the information collected, produced or paid for by the public bodies and made freely available for re-use for any purpose
The following implementation is an example of how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): datos.gob.es https://datos.gob.es/en

The Open Data Representation ABB is salient for semantic interoperability because it is the basis for sharing, reusing and making available relevant and public information from public organisations and the digital public services delivery.
